title: Avoid deleted daemon executable in cockpit commands
goal: Prevent Herdr cockpit monitor and painter panes from launching a literal khazad-doom (deleted) path after the installed binary is replaced while the daemon is still running.
acceptance: Cockpit feed, gate painter, and worker painter commands do not quote a current_exe path ending in the Linux ' (deleted)' suffix when a live installed khazad-doom path exists.
A regression test covers stripping the Linux deleted-executable suffix before shell command construction.
If no reusable current executable can be found, cockpit commands continue to fall back to khazad-doom on PATH.
